risk_if_not_implemented: Without Third-Party Personnel Security, third-party risks may go unmanaged, creating supply-chain exposure that compromises the organization.

compensating_control_1.name: Personnel Screening
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to manage personnel security risk by screening individuals prior to authorizing access.
compensating_control_1.justification: Personnel Screening (HRS-04) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Third-Party Personnel Security (TPM-06) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Third-Party Management
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of third-party management controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Third-Party Management (TPM-01) provides third-party oversight that compensates for the absence of Third-Party Personnel Security (TPM-06) by extending security obligations contractually and monitoring third-party risk in lieu of direct control. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
